content.name: Pokey's Hull Mod Rebalance
content.description: DRAFT. Turns ship/hull mods into four archetypes: Racer (mass+drag, mobility), Tank (hull + sensors + loadout), Ghost (stealth), Explorer (hazard resist). Hull is the always-good stat that scales each tier and rides on every Enhanced/Exceptional mod. No roll RNG. Numbers only, no new wares, savegame-safe.
content.author: Pokey

text.name: Pokey's Hull Mod Rebalance
text.description: DRAFT. Ship mods as four archetypes: Racer (mobility), Tank (hull+sensors+loadout), Ghost (stealth), Explorer (hazard resist). Hull scales each tier. No roll RNG. Numbers only, savegame-safe.
text.author: Pokey
